sentences.arabic: يَتَصَاعَدُ الْجَدَلُ حَوْلَ قَانُونِ الصَّحَافَةِ الْجَدِيدِ الَّذِي يَرَى فِيهِ الصَّحَفِيُّونَ تَضْيِيقًا عَلَى حُرِّيَّةِ التَّعْبِيرِ وَاسْتِقْلَالِيَّةِ وَسَائِلِ الْإِعْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Rasprava o novom zakonu o štampi se intenzivirala, a novinari u njemu vide sužavanje slobode govora i neovisnosti medija.
sentences.translationEn: The debate over the new press law is intensifying, with journalists seeing it as a restriction on freedom of expression and media independence.
